# Kommunal- og distriktsdepartementet

*29 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Lov om Husbanken](../lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.html) | Husbankloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-05-29-30) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) · [v2009](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2009/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) |
| [Lov om Sametinget og andre samiske rettsforhold (sameloven)](../lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.html) | Sameloven – samel | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1987-06-12-56) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) |
| [Lov om burettslag (burettslagslova)](../lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.html) | Burettslagslova – brl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2003-06-06-39) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) · [v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2003/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) |
| [Lov om bustadbyggjelag (bustadbyggjelagslova)](../lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.html) | Bustadbyggjelagslova – bbl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2003-06-06-38) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) · [v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2003/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) |
| [Lov om bustøtte og kommunale bustadtilskot (bustøttelova)](../lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.html) | Bustøttelova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2012-08-24-64) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.md) · [v2012](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2012/lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.md) |
| [Lov om eierseksjoner (eierseksjonsloven)](../lover/lov-2017-06-16-65.html) | Eierseksjonsloven – eiersl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-65) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-65.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-06-16-65.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-06-16-65.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-65.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-65.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-65.md) |
| [Lov om eigedomsregistrering (matrikkellova)](../lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.html) | Matrikkellova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-06-17-101) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i lov om interkommunale selskaper (møteoffentlegheit, økonomifo](../lover/lov-2023-06-02-22.html) | Endringslov til lov om interkommunale selskaper | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2023-06-02-22) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-06-02-22.md) · [v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2023/lover/lov-2023-06-02-22.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2023-06-02-22.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2023-06-02-22.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2023-06-02-22.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i burettslagslova og eierseksjonsloven (tilrettelegging for bol](../lover/lov-2025-12-19-114.html) | Endringslov til burettslagslova og eierseksjonsloven (tilrettelegging for boligkjøpsmodeller) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-12-19-114) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-19-114.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-12-19-114.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-12-19-114.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i husleieloven (omorganisering av Husleietvistutvalget)](../lover/lov-2025-12-22-127.html) | Endringslov til husleieloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-12-22-127) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-127.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-12-22-127.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-12-22-127.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i partiloven (innberetning og offentliggjøring av bidrag fra ba](../lover/lov-2025-06-20-94.html) | Endringslov til partiloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-94) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-94.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-94.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-94.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i plan- og bygningsloven (planbestemmelser om borettslag)](../lover/lov-2026-03-06-7.html) | Endringslov til plan- og bygningsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2026-03-06-7) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2026-03-06-7.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2026-03-06-7.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i plan- og bygningsloven og matrikkellova (nye virkemidler ved ](../lover/lov-2025-06-20-93.html) | Endringslov til plan- og bygningsloven og matrikkellova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-93) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-93.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-93.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-93.md) |
| [Lov om fastsetjing og endring av kommune- og fylkesgrenser (inndelingslova)](../lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.html) | Inndelingslova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2001-06-15-70) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) |
| [Lov om flagging på kommunenes offentlige bygninger](../lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.html) | Lov om flagging på kommunale bygninger | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1933-06-29-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) |
| [Lov om forsøk i offentlig forvaltning (forsøksloven)](../lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.html) | Forsøksloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-06-26-87) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) |
| [Lov om husleieavtaler (husleieloven)](../lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.html) | Husleieloven – husll | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1999-03-26-17) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang mv. for Kommisjonen for å granske fornorskingspolitik](../lover/lov-2020-05-12-41.html) | Lov om informasjonstilgang (fornorskingspolitikk) | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-05-12-41) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-05-12-41.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2020-05-12-41.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-05-12-41.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-05-12-41.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-05-12-41.md) |
| [Lov om infrastruktur for geografisk informasjon (geodataloven)](../lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.html) | Geodataloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2010-09-03-56) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.md) |
| [Lov om interkommunale selskaper (IKS-loven)](../lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.html) | IKS-loven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1999-01-29-6) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) |
| [Lov om kommunal forkjøpsrett til leiegårder](../lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.html) | Lov om kommunal forkjøpsrett til leiegårder | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1977-04-29-34) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) |
| [Lov om kommunenes ansvar på det boligsosiale feltet [boligsosialloven]](../lover/lov-2022-12-20-121.html) | Boligsosialloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2022-12-20-121) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-12-20-121.md) · [v2022](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2022/lover/lov-2022-12-20-121.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2022-12-20-121.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2022-12-20-121.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2022-12-20-121.md) |
| [Lov om kommuner og fylkeskommuner (kommuneloven)](../lover/lov-2018-06-22-83.html) | Kommuneloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2018-06-22-83) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-22-83.md) · [v2018](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2018/lover/lov-2018-06-22-83.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2018-06-22-83.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2018-06-22-83.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2018-06-22-83.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2018-06-22-83.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Noregs Kommunalbank til aksjeselskap](../lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.html) | Lov om Kommunalbanken AS – Kombl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1999-07-16-68) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) |
| [Lov om planlegging og byggesaksbehandling (plan- og bygningsloven)](../lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.html) | Plan- og bygningsloven – pbl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2008-06-27-71) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) · [v2008](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2008/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) |
| [Lov om registrering av regjeringsmedlemmers, statssekretærers og politiske rådgi](../lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.html) | Lov om registrering av verv og økonomiske interesser | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2012-11-30-70) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.md) · [v2012](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2012/lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.md) |
| [Lov om regulering av byggje- og anleggsverksemd](../lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.html) | Lov om regulering av byggje- og anleggsverksemd | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1996-03-22-16) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) |
| [Lov om valg til Stortinget, fylkesting og kommunestyrer (valgloven)](../lover/lov-2023-06-16-62.html) | Valgloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2023-06-16-62) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-06-16-62.md) · [v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2023/lover/lov-2023-06-16-62.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2023-06-16-62.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2023-06-16-62.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2023-06-16-62.md) |
| [Lov om visse forhold vedrørende de politiske partiene (partiloven)](../lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.html) | Partiloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-06-17-102) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) |
